2603.20505.title: Efficient Counterfactual Reasoning in ProbLog via Single World Intervention Programs
2603.20505.paper_summary: Probabilistic Logic Programming (PLP) languages, like ProbLog, naturally support reasoning under uncertainty, while maintaining a declarative and interpretable framework. Meanwhile, counterfactual reasoning (i.e., answering ``what if'' questions) is critical for ensuring AI systems are robust and trustworthy; however, integrating this capability into PLP can be computationally prohibitive and unstable in accuracy. This paper addresses this challenge, by proposing an efficient program transformation for counterfactuals as Single World Intervention Programs (SWIPs) in ProbLog. By systematically splitting ProbLog clauses to observed and fixed components relevant to a counterfactual, we create a transformed program that (1) does not asymptotically exceed the computational complexity of existing methods, and is strictly smaller in common cases, and (2) reduces counterfactual reasoning to marginal inference over a simpler program. We formally prove the correctness of our approach, which relies on a weaker set independence assumptions and is consistent with conditional independencies, showing the resulting marginal probabilities match the counterfactual distributions of the underlying Structural Causal Model in wide domains. Our method achieves a 35\% reduction in inference time versus existing methods in extensive experiments. This work makes complex counterfactual reasoning more computationally tractable and reliable, providing a crucial step towards developing more robust and explainable AI systems. The code is at https://github.com/EVIEHub/swip.
2603.20505.paper_summary_zh: 概率邏輯程式設計（PLP）語言，如ProbLog，自然支持在不確定性下的推理，同時保持宣告式和可解釋的框架。<lb/>與此同時，反事實推理（即回答「如果...會怎樣」的問題）對於確保AI系統的穩健性和可信度至關重要；然而，將這一能力整合到PLP中可能在計算上是不可行的，並且準確性不穩定。<lb/>本文針對這一挑戰，提出了一種將反事實轉換為ProbLog中的單一世界干預程序（SWIPs）的高效程序轉換。<lb/>通過系統地將ProbLog子句拆分為與反事實相關的觀察和固定組件，我們創建了一個轉換程序，該程序（1）在漸進上不超過現有方法的計算複雜度，並且在常見情況下嚴格更小，以及（2）將反事實推理簡化為對更簡單程序的邊際推斷。<lb/>我們正式證明了我們方法的正確性，該方法依賴於較弱的獨立性假設，並且與條件獨立性一致，顯示出結果的邊際概率與廣泛領域中基礎結構因果模型的反事實分佈相匹配。<lb/>我們的方法在廣泛的實驗中實現了與現有方法相比35%的推斷時間減少。<lb/>這項工作使得複雜的反事實推理在計算上變得更可行和可靠，為開發更穩健和可解釋的AI系統提供了關鍵步驟。<lb/>代碼位於 https://github.com/EVIEHub/swip。
2603.20505.author: Saimun Habib et.al.
2603.20505.authors: Saimun Habib, Vaishak Belle, Fengxiang He
